Bash(sed -i 's/var ce = qty \\* cost \\* lev \\* mr;/var ce = qty * cost;/' PerAcc_Data.html)

Bash(sed -i 's/var ce  = \(parseFloat\(pos.quantity||0\) \\* parseFloat\(pos.cost_price||0\) \\* lev \\* mr\).toFixed\(2\);/var ce  = \(parseFloat\(pos.quantity||0\) * parseFloat\(pos.cost_price||0\)\).toFixed\(2\);/' PerAcc_Data.html)

Bash(sed -i "s/<input type=\\"number\\" class=\\"pos-qty\\" step=\\"0.01\\" placeholder=\\"0\\" oninput=\\"PA.recalcEquity\(\)\\">/<input type=\\"number\\" class=\\"pos-qty\\" step=\\"1\\" placeholder=\\"0\\" oninput=\\"PA.recalcEquity\(\)\\">/" PerAcc_Data.html)

Bash(sed -i "s/<input type=\\"number\\" class=\\"pos-lev\\" step=\\"0.01\\" placeholder=\\"1\\" value=\\"1\\" oninput=\\"PA.recalcEquity\(\)\\">/<input type=\\"number\\" class=\\"pos-lev\\" step=\\"1\\" placeholder=\\"1\\" value=\\"1\\" oninput=\\"PA.recalcEquity\(\)\\">/" PerAcc_Data.html)

Bash(sed -i "s/+ '<td><input type=\\"number\\" class=\\"pos-qty\\" step=\\"0.01\\" placeholder=\\"0\\" oninput=\\"PA.recalcEquity\(\)\\"><\\/td>'/+ '<td><input type=\\"number\\" class=\\"pos-qty\\" step=\\"1\\" placeholder=\\"0\\" oninput=\\"PA.recalcEquity\(\)\\"><\\/td>'/" PerAcc_Data.html)

Bash(sed -i "s/+ '<td><input type=\\"number\\" class=\\"pos-lev\\" step=\\"0.01\\" placeholder=\\"1\\" value=\\"1\\" oninput=\\"PA.recalcEquity\(\)\\"><\\/td>'/+ '<td><input type=\\"number\\" class=\\"pos-lev\\" step=\\"1\\" placeholder=\\"1\\" value=\\"1\\" oninput=\\"PA.recalcEquity\(\)\\"><\\/td>'/" PerAcc_Data.html)

Bash(sed -i "s/var lev = parseFloat\(pos.leverage || 1\);/var lev = parseInt\(pos.leverage || 1\);/" PerAcc.html)
